name: hep-research
description: Optional discovery of HEP literature, publication records, documents, and public result data.

interface.short_description: Discover HEP literature and public results.
interface.long_description: An optional integration boundary for finding HEP papers, citations, CERN documents, publication metadata, and public HEPData tables.
default_prompts: Find recent LHCb papers about this topic.
Locate the HEPData record for this measurement.
List the static CDS experiment metadata exposed by this integration.
